creator: marcel@herrbischoff.com
text:
Thanks for the info. I will do that from now on as well, to avoid running into something like this again. 

BTW, the author has responded to my GitHub issue and confirmed the folder should not exist and will be removed in the next release. I believe we should wait for the next release to happen instead of compensating for a temporary upstream issue. I will update this bug report accordingly when that happens.
